title: ux-HeaderFooter
text: ux-HeaderFooter This section provides description for the logical UX component widget ux-HeaderFooter properties. ux-HeaderFooter widget Table 1. Widget Summary Property Description Logical widget name: ux-HeaderFooter Maps to physical widget: Default definition: ux-HeaderFooter=uxHeaderFooter() Supported triggers: Use for: Layout to structure a web page into three semantic regions — header, main, and footer.
